tabs.label: Schema
Render
Fetcher

ref-searchShortcuts-description.plaintext:
Renders a set of values as links into a faceted search — a "tag cloud" of shortcuts. Each value links to a search page with ?facet.<index>=<value> pre-set, which a Search block reads from the URL.

This is a custom example block — register its fetcher via initBridge (see below).

children.text: Renders a set of values as links into a faceted search — a "tag cloud" of shortcuts. Each value links to a search page with ?facet.<index>=<value> pre-set, which a Search block reads from the URL.
This is a custom example block — register its fetcher via initBridge (see below).

ref-searchShortcuts-rendering-intro.plaintext: This block has no bespoke renderer — register the fetcher below, then render its items exactly like any list block. See the Listing example for the render component in React, Vue and Svelte, Listings for how expansion works, and Custom Blocks for registering a block type. Only the fetcher below is block-specific.
